theme: bus lines for weekdays, weekends, and stadium nights
title: Bus Lines for Weekdays, Weekends, and Stadium Nights
seed_problem: route-network design under a shared length budget serving multiple OD-matrix scenarios
mutation: composite: minimax-regret-vs-oracle (score = worst-case ratio to a per-scenario dedicated reference, not raw cost) coupled with route-network-design (one shared set of L bus-line paths under a total length budget) across od-matrix-scenarios (weekday/weekend/stadium-night demand matrices); a scenario's regret weight is decoupled from its demand volume, so a low-volume but cheap-to-serve scenario can dominate the objective if starved.
strategies: trivial: minimal-effort reference -- pool all demand by weight, try one line for the heaviest pair using only 3% of the budget, stop the moment it doesn't fit

greedy: fit lines to the pooled/summed OD matrix (highest weekday/weekend weight pairs first) -- nearly matches weekday's own oracle but leaves the stadium spur completely unserved, so stadium-night regret hits the full walk-penalty ceiling

strong (insight): read each scenario's shipped oracle cost, estimate each scenario's do-nothing regret to find which scenario is regret-critical, and buy that scenario's corridor FIRST before spending remaining budget on the pooled/highest-weight remainder
invalid: emits an out-of-range stop index, guaranteed infeasible
